# Sample Markdown Document

## Introduction

This is a sample markdown document for testing the ingestion module. It contains multiple headings and paragraphs to verify heading-based parsing.

## Main Content

RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) is a technique that combines retrieval systems with generative models. It helps ground LLM responses in factual documents.

### Subsection A

Enterprise RAG requires robust document parsing, chunking strategies, and hybrid retrieval methods.

### Subsection B

Evaluation metrics such as Recall@k, MRR, and nDCG are essential for measuring retrieval quality.

## Conclusion

This document serves as a test fixture for the ingestion module.
